region_name: Devon and Torbay Combined County Authority
strap: Devon and Torbay Digital draws £311m of UKRI lead-led funding across 263 grants, anchored by Exeter (35%), with Plessey Semiconductors and Met Office on the industrial side. 11 Companies House-traced spin-outs translate to £28m UKRI per spin-out.
behaviour: The cluster shows low-confidence "Re-proving instead of narrowing" behaviour — research narrative is reinforced by recurring programme launches rather than narrowing toward commercial scaling, with academic capacity reabsorbing the cluster's signal.
